name: Seed parity with client-scope links
outcome: A Drizzle seed reproduces the exact users, client, and scopes the SvelteKit client depends on, and links the client to its scopes (fixing the original seed bug).
scope: src/db/seed.ts and the db:seed script. Read-path repos consume this in a later slice.
acceptance_criteria: pnpm db:seed inserts user jason@example.com (id dd74961a-c348-4471-98a5-19fc3c5b5079) with a bcrypt hash of password123 and createdIP 127.0.0.1
Client 'Sample Client' (id 0e2ec2df-ee53-4327-a472-9d78c278bdbb) exists with redirect http://localhost:5173/callback and grants authorization_code/client_credentials/refresh_token
Scopes contacts.read (id c3d49dba-53c8-4d08-970f-9c567414732e) and contacts.write (id 22861a6c-dd8d-47b3-be1f-a3e7b67943bc) exist and are linked to the client via oauthClientScopes
steps: src/db/seed.ts — upsert the user with the exact id and a bcryptjs hash of password123, preserving createdIP
src/db/seed.ts — upsert 'Sample Client' with the exact id, redirectUris [http://localhost:5173/callback], allowedGrants [authorization_code, client_credentials, refresh_token]
src/db/seed.ts — upsert scopes contacts.read and contacts.write with their exact ids, then insert oauthClientScopes rows linking the client to both scopes
notes: Exact IDs/values must match prisma/seed.ts so web/src/lib/auth.ts keeps working. The original seed created scopes but never linked them to the client; this slice fixes that per ADR-0001.
